title: ฝ ห and the three s's
pedagogy: High-class consonants (2/3): fricatives ฝ (f) and ห (h), plus the three high-class s letters ส ศ ษ — one sound, three spellings.

exercises.title: Three letters, one sound
body: Thai has three high-class letters that all say s: ส is the everyday one, ศ appears mostly in Indic loanwords, and ษ is the rare third.
Reading is easy — they're all just s. Which one a word uses is spelling knowledge you'll absorb word by word.
All three are high class, so they follow the same tone rules.
